title: Widest Vertical Area Between Two Points Containing No Points
titleCn: 两点之间不包含任何点的最宽垂直区域

testcases.input: points = [[8,7],[9,9],[7,4],[9,7]] Output: 1 Explanation: Both the red and the blue area are optimal.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Both the red and the blue area are optimal.
